title: RFID EPC EPCIS Event
description: An EPCIS 2.0 event capturing the state or movement of RFID-tagged objects in a supply chain

eventTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event occurred

eventTimeZoneOffset.description: Time zone offset of the event (e.g., +00:00)

items.description: Electronic Product Code in URN format (e.g., urn:epc:id:sgtin:0614141.107346.2017)

epcList.description: List of EPCs involved in the event

action.description: The action taken on the EPCs at this event

bizStep.description: Business step URI indicating the business process step (CBV vocabulary)

disposition.description: Disposition URI indicating the status of the objects (CBV vocabulary)

id.description: URI identifying the specific physical read point
URI identifying the business location (GLN or custom URI)

items.description: Sensor data (temperature, humidity, etc.) associated with the event
